title: So insanely proud of everyone I met last year through consulting and courses. @seanxthielen doing amazing things creatively and more to come @HamelHusain ‘s tear was literally redefining what is possible as a solo business. @vig_xyz is on an insane PE consulting un @ivanleomk went from being some kid reviewing PRs to moving to SF for the next chapter of his career @humford at a16z crushing new media.
